topics.title: Delete a user account and its personal cabinet.

content.text: Delete a user account and its personal cabinet.

It is common for users to leave an organization, and then they need to be removed from the Windchill system. A business administrator must know how to delete a user account. The deletion of a user is possible in the Participant Administration window. An account removal involves personal cabinet and Windchill user deletion. Details about the deleted user, such as the user’s name, are retained in Windchill to allow searches for objects created by the user and to maintain auditing logs. The user also remains a member of any context teams but is marked as deleted.

topics.title: Exercise — Add the User to Participant Administration Table

content.text: In this exercise you will add the User to Participant Administration Table.

content.title: Add the User to Participant Administration Table
content.objective: Complete the add the user to participant administration table procedure.

tasks.title: Add the User to Participant Administration Table

steps.action: Click the Participant Administration link in the Business Administration section of the Utilities page.
Click the Add participants to the table icon at the top of the Participant Administration table.
In the Search for User window click the Participant Name field. Type the username of the participant that you want to delete.
ClickOKto close the Find Participant window and return the selected records to the Participant Administration table.

topics.title: Exercise — Delete a User Account

content.text: In this exercise you will delete a User Account.

content.title: Delete a User Account
content.objective: Complete the delete a user account procedure.

steps.action: Select the checkbox to the left of your user.
Click the Actions menu and select Delete from Windchill and Directory Server.
Click OK on the Delete Participant confirmation window.

topics.title: Exercise — Delete the User’s Personal Cabinet

content.text: In this exercise you will delete the User’s Personal Cabinet.

content.title: Delete the User’s Personal Cabinet
content.objective: Complete the delete the user’s personal cabinet procedure.

steps.action: Click the Personal Cabinets Administration link in the System Administration section.
Select the checkbox to the left of the user.
ClickDelete at the top of the Personal Cabinets Administration window.
Click OK to confirm the deletion of the Personal Cabinet.
Click Close to close the Personal Cabinets Administration window.
